changeSet.author: sumicare
sumicare
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 1' AND t.staff_number = 'TH006'; INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 2' AND t.staff_number = 'TH007'; INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 3' AND t.staff_number = 'TH008'; INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 4' AND t.staff_number = 'TH009'; INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 5' AND t.staff_number = 'TH010';
